### v338-6 -- Hygiene KPI (universal)

- **Type**: Universal (always)
- **Owner repo**: global-kb
- **Branch**: docs/v338-mvp-close (or paired with -7)
- **Files**:
  - `reports/research/sprint-v338-hygiene-kpi.md` (new this sprint)
- **R1 OSS evidence**: n/a (KPI is a markdown snapshot)
- **Acceptance**:
  - Shell-leak count (runx shell-leak-scan --all-repos) recorded.
  - Alias drift gate (runx config check-aliases v299) recorded.
  - Sentrux Quality + complex_fn per touched repo recorded (before / after).
  - Hook hit rate from cursor-tools metrics recorded.
  - Resource-probe NDJSON density (lines/hour) recorded.
  - OCI retry attempts (if mem0-oci-retry plist loaded) recorded.
  - Carry-forward register from previous sprint reviewed and updated.
- **Pause/resume notes**: Hygiene KPI is the last story to close; capture state if interrupted in `reports/research/v338-handoff-<date>.md`.
- **Calendar deadline**: T+60 min from last GREEN commit on themed stories.

### v338-7 -- EvoLoop capsule + retro + daily-startup entry (universal)

- **Type**: Universal (always)
- **Owner repo**: global-kb
- **Branch**: docs/v338-mvp-close (or paired with -6)
- **Files**:
  - `global-memories/capsules/v338-mem0-tokyo-cutover-supervisor-soak.md` (rollup of 5 themed + 2 universal stories with evidence cells)
  - `sprint-retros/v338-mem0-tokyo-cutover-supervisor-soak.md` (lessons learnt + carry-forward to next sprint)
  - One-line addition to `global-memories/daily-startup-prompt.md` under "Current source-of-truth notes"
- **R1 OSS evidence**: n/a (durable knowledge artefacts)
- **Acceptance**:
  - All three files present and dated within 1h of last GREEN (`post-sprint-commit-merge.mdc`).
  - Plan-sync PR `docs/v338-<theme>` OPEN against `cursor-global-kb` main (never auto-merged).
  - Carry-forward register lists every blocker by repo + branch + last GREEN SHA.
- **Pause/resume notes**: Capsule and retro are the durable record; if interrupted, write `reports/research/v338-handoff-<date>.md` and update the daily-startup-prompt with the handoff path.
- **Calendar deadline**: T+60 min from last GREEN commit on themed stories.
